title: Sterling NLB101 Standard Deadlocking Brass Plated Nightlatch (Old Version)
features: Suitable for left & right opening doors
Bolt and knob can be deadlocked from the outside by full turn of the key
Lock is key operated from the outside and lever handle operated from the inside
